Not sure who owns this but have picked fruit from apple multiple seasons and nobody has said anything just be respectful. Not sure what variety. Tree is across the street from the Malone assembly church. Huge tree grows giant apples. Not bad for eating, great

Large mouth bass, bluegill, yellow perch and rainbow trout. Play area for kids. Boat launch. Picnic tables. Pond next door is great swimming spot. Black berries everywhere. Great spot to take the whole family and spend the day having fun fishing and foraging.
